---
title: "Marco Pelliccia"
subtitle: "PhD · Birkbeck, University of London<br> Economist · Academic · Data Scientist"
image: images/profile.jpg
page-layout: full
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:mpellicciawork@gmail.com
---



## About 

I am an economist and Assistant Professor at Edinburgh Business School, Heriot-Watt University. I hold a PhD in Economics from Birkbeck, University of London, where I specialised in network economics and game theory.

My research focuses on how strategic interactions and interdependencies across agents shape economic outcomes, with applications to market design, policy analysis, and risk in interconnected systems.

I have over eight years' experience in higher education, teaching courses in microeconomics, game theory, and economic policy. I have also completed the MIT Applied Data Science Program, where I worked on machine learning models for prediction and risk assessment.

[Download CV](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/n0wkjcrwjxm8phx2dq726/CV_MP.pdf?rlkey=cx2f5yeqqj0vmzupmdwbetg2v&e=1&st=jq6t2pyb&dl=0){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}

## Research Interests

- Microeconomic Theory
- Network Economics & Game Theory
- Market Design & Policy Analysis
- Machine Learning & Data-Driven Analysis

## Chat with Marco: Ask about research, teaching, and background



```{=html}
<script type="module" src="https://gradio.s3-us-west-2.amazonaws.com/5.49.1/gradio.js"></script>
<div style="width: 100%; margin: 20px 0;">
  <div style="width: 100%; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; min-height: 500px;">
    <gradio-app style="width: 100%;" src="https://ddmarco-career-conversation.hf.space"></gradio-app>
  </div>
</div>
```
